when_to_use: Developer behavior risk tracking in CI/CD pipeline
SDLC security posture scoring for dev teams
Alert on risky code patterns before production deploy
Compliance audit trail for developer access and actions

pros: SDLC context rivals CSPM tools miss
cons: Risk of alert fatigue if misconfigured
review.verdict: Interesting early-stage DevSecOps play, worth piloting if insider SDLC risk is on your radar.
review.best_for: Security teams worried about shadow dev activity and SDLC-origin risk
review.not_for: Teams who haven't yet covered basics like SAST, SCA, and secrets scanning
